sglang.title: Fix eagle3 cuda graph
sglang.author: Ja1Zhou
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fixes eagle3 cuda graph runner when target_hidden_size != hidden_size (#7011)

Modifications
--- a/python/sglang/srt/speculative/eagle_draft_extend_cuda_graph_runner.py
+++ b/python/sglang/srt/speculative/eagle_draft_extend_cuda_graph_runner.py
@@ -84,7 +84,15 @@ class EAGLEDraftExtendCud

sglang.title: fix: fix the bug of loading Internvl3
sglang.author: coco-alen
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When trying to use the InternVL3  model, you will get an error:

Unsupported architecture: Qwen2ForCausalLM

This is because Internvl3 uses the llm structure of qwen2 in models except 9b, and this is not specified in python/sglang/srt/configs/internvl.py
Modifications
Only changed the pyt

Related #7712
